message:
fix(ops,registry): improve mutex error handling and use unreachable! for impossible match arms

- telemetry_bridge: Replace .expect("state") with explicit
  .map(|s| s.snapshot()).unwrap_or_else(|_| panic!("state lock poisoned"))
  for clearer diagnostics when mutex lock fails in test assertions
- staking_governance: Replace panic!("unexpected error") with
  unreachable!("unexpected error") in test match catch-all arms,
  since these branches are structurally unreachable after the
  preceding pattern match

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
